archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury mixed with Archetype 4 (High-Contrast Tech)
vibe: Expensive, futuristic, powerful, minimal, confident, glassmorphism
design_philosophy: E1 Protocol: Avoid generic AI layouts. Use extreme asymmetry, deep z-index layering, heavy glassmorphism with 'milled crystal' borders, and ambient light blobs underneath UI elements. 'Inter' is banned for headings to avoid the 'Vercel template' look. Focus on high-contrast text and dark matte backgrounds.

hierarchy.body: text-base md:text-lg font-normal leading-relaxed tracking-wide text-[#A1A1AA]

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (p-12 to p-32) to create breathing room.

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.premium_card: bg-white/[0.03] backdrop-blur-[24px] border border-white/[0.12] rounded-3xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/[0.08] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/[0.2]
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.header_nav: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/[0.12] z-50 sticky top-0
surfaces_and_glassmorphism.floating_blobs: absolute rounded-full blur-[120px] mix-blend-screen pointer-events-none opacity-40

motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: All cards must have slight negative Y translation and border brightness increase.
motion_and_interactions.parallax: Use scroll-linked subtle parallax for background floating glass layers.

buttons.primary: relative overflow-hidden bg-white text-black font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-full transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,255,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 bg-transparent text-white font-medium px-8 py-4 rounded-full backdrop-blur-md transition-all hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/40
buttons.floating_connect: fixed bottom-8 right-8 w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#7C3AED] to-[#22D3EE] text-white flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(124,58,237,0.5)] cursor-pointer hover:scale-110 transition-transform z-50 backdrop-blur-xl

hero_section.structure: Deep relative container. Back layer: dark mesh gradient and glowing blobs. Middle layer: floating glass cards (decorative). Front layer: Typography and CTAs.
hero_section.title: We Build Brands That People Remember.

admin_dashboard.sidebar: w-64 bg-[#09090B] border-r border-white/10 h-screen sticky top-0

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract purple and pink fluid gradient to use as under-layer for glassmorphism.
Dark metallic fluid texture for section dividers or cards.

office_and_team.description: Luxury modern office architecture for 'About Us' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard HTML/Tailwind components for the Marketing website to allow free-form asymmetrical layouts, overlapping layers, and deep glassmorphism.
Use standard Shadcn UI components for the Admin Dashboard and Lead Capture forms, modifying them to use the dark theme and violet/cyan accents.
Do NOT use standard 'Inter' font for headings. Setup 'Outfit' or 'Cabinet Grotesk' in Google Fonts.
Strictly follow the color tokens. Avoid raw #000000, use #09090B (Zinc 950) instead.
Include 'data-testid' on ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) using kebab-case role-based names (e.g., 'data-testid="hero-cta-button"').
Implement the floating connect button globally on the marketing side.
For the hero background, place floating blur divs behind the main content to create the 'Apple/Linear' glow effect.
Ensure high contrast. Normal text must be pure white (#FFFFFF) or light gray (#A1A1AA) against the dark backgrounds.
